eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Pierce; Kitsap; King; Snohomish; Island; Jefferson, WA; at 12:11 PM on JUL 20, 2026 Effective until 3:11 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test, only a test, of the Emergency Alert System from the Kitsap County Department of Emergency Management. Had this been an actual emergency the system would bring you important public safety information. The following tones will conclude this test.
